h8bb7f315gc73ag4128g8b93g3902c2abe9df: The pale one is dead - and for the better, given his dubious palate.
ha925fad8g733cg4af8g8ea0gedbc6628ae85: He was a threat - he had to be exterminated.
h2db08eecg31a0g4f59g844egc82d04d1cf9f: You acted quickly and justly - as the ghaik covet minds, so do vampires covet blood.
hb93f7297g2b4dg48a2gb461g1b52b091f6ea: I'm tempted to commend you. I'm certain this will pass.
ha718215ag5905g4d20g8952g0c467cf0ec8d: I was rash. Maybe he could have controlled his... urges.
h4f43cd02g7c2fg4b75gb75cgec5fd6776068: You acted justly. As the ghaik covet minds, so do vampires covet blood. It is their nature.
h67e7faf9g57c5g4bb2g85dfg633a26cb1a3a: And I do not intend on becoming anyone's meal, vampire or otherwise.
hd0dc6a8cg7817g4177g9a40gb2d3d2d0b366: Excuse me? I am nothing if not delectable.
h0ec2ef88g900dg4e6bgba20g6e9fc19c45c5: An acquired taste, I imagine. By all means, lay yourself out for the next threat to feast on.
h542ee842gc122g47b9ga591ga4ba39bdd8a4: I do not intend on becoming any creature's meal, vampire or otherwise.
h2a57a4e0ga7c1g40bbga17bgfbe68aeb3ffe: The pale one is gone - and for the better, given his dubious palate.
h36b2db99g5fc1g4afegb9dcg5374d3a6c3a4: I can't believe I let a vampire into our midst.
he23f1caegc5d8g433cgb7dbg19d7c72ba9f1: None that travels the planes is without secrets. We are liars all, in what we reveal or in what we withhold.
hef6e9db1gf78fg45ecg9861g3215fabf0c81: Let us hope our next ally's secret does not involve a craving for our blood.
h4a65ac3fg89f6g4802gb4aag78bfd2dccc7d: A vampire. Not unexpected - none that travels the planes is without secrets.
h17fd1c07gab27g403agaf56g9bd8d6bf0729: We are liars all, in what we reveal or in what we withhold.
h3cf6044bg79c0g4859gbfa2g9762bfce1c81: I always felt something was off about him.
h59af1793g8f56g4080g9530gfe851ad641c1: Yet you chose to stand idle rather than take action?
h22d2d999gab17g4c4bgaed4g0fe0cdf3afd0: I'd sooner trust a vampire than the prey seasoning itself for his next supper.
h5c32e7f2g1ddfg4ddcgb83aga906360cc985: Astarion, a vampire - I can hardly believe it.
ha4cc14bcgf962g4169gb375ga1b628880529: No more unbelievable than the parasite biding its time within us.
hf1def920g5236g45aeg9c65g8786d0757fa6: Is that so? And what are you keeping from me?
hec01a67egbd0cg4a7fg99bbg2d9d80a02bf7: The answer to that question, first and utmost.
